description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner to those parties responsible for taking corrective action, including senior management and the board of directors.

subcriteria.name: deficiency_tracking
subcriteria.reference_text: Audit findings and control deficiencies tracked in a remediation tracker or issue management system like Jira. Each finding has an owner, severity rating, due date, and status. Findings tracked until fully resolved.

subcriteria.name: management_reporting
subcriteria.reference_text: Deficiencies reported to senior management and the board or audit committee. Serious findings escalated immediately. Quarterly reports to the board summarize open findings, remediation progress, and risk exposure.

subcriteria.name: corrective_action
subcriteria.reference_text: Corrective action plans developed for each deficiency with defined remediation steps, responsible parties, and target completion dates. Management monitors progress and verifies remediation effectiveness.

mismatch_signals.reason: Security event monitoring is not deficiency communication.
Security infrastructure is not deficiency reporting.
